paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.01, with a change of 1.26% from the prior close and a change of -30.66% over a window of 21 sessions. There have been 3 new news items in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's governance concerns and a $375 million convertibles deal. The resignation of director designee Miles Everson, who cited governance concerns, has been reported. Additionally, there are questions about whether the company's stock is above fair value after a note offering.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K form detailing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Another 8-K form disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson, effective July 10, 2026, due to a disagreement over access to company books and records. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 0 Form 144 filings.
